seed_instruction: What were the causes and consequences of the fall of the Roman Empire?
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 200 words, with each sentence containing at most 20 words.
instruction: What were the causes and consequences of the fall of the Roman Empire? The response must contain exactly five sentences. The response must contain at least 200 words, with each sentence containing at most 20 words.
response: Internal political instability severely weakened the Western Empire.  Economic decline, rampant inflation, and over-taxation strained the populace.  Barbarian migrations, spurred by external pressures, intensified military threats.  These converging crises led to the fragmentation of central authority.  Ultimately, this decline reshaped European society profoundly.<turn|>
